languages.text: "Я понятия не имею, кто ты, но, кажется, тебе эта планета нужнее, чем мне. Давай договоримся об отступных".

traits.locale_text: "Я понятия не имею, кто ты, но, кажется, тебе эта планета нужнее, чем мне. Давай договоримся об отступных".
"Я понятия не имею, кто ты, но, кажется, тебе эта планета нужнее, чем мне. Давай договоримся об отступных".

languages.text: "I have no idea who you are, but it looks like you need this planet more than I do. Let us negotiate a compensation."
languages.original_text: "Я понятия не имею, кто ты, но, кажется, тебе эта планета нужнее, чем мне. Давай договоримся об отступных".

traits.locale_text: "I have no idea who you are, but it looks like you need this planet more than I do. Let us negotiate a compensation."
"I have no idea who you are, but it looks like you need this planet more than I do. Let us negotiate a compensation."
"I have no idea who you are, but it looks like you need this planet more than I do. Let us negotiate a compensation."

languages.text: "Ich habe keine Ahnung, wer Sie sind, aber es sieht so aus, als bräuchten Sie diesen Planeten mehr als ich. Lassen Sie uns eine Entschädigung aushandeln."
languages.original_text: "I have no idea who you are, but it looks like you need this planet more than I do. Let us negotiate a compensation."

languages.text: "Je n'ai aucune idée de qui vous êtes, mais il semble que vous ayez plus besoin de cette planète que moi. Négocions une compensation."
languages.original_text: "I have no idea who you are, but it looks like you need this planet more than I do. Let us negotiate a compensation."

languages.text: "我不知道你是谁 但看起来你比我更需要这颗星球让我们来谈谈补偿吧。"
languages.original_text: "I have no idea who you are, but it looks like you need this planet more than I do. Let us negotiate a compensation."

languages.text: "No tengo ni idea de quién eres, pero parece que necesitas este planeta más que yo. Negociemos una compensación".
languages.original_text: "I have no idea who you are, but it looks like you need this planet more than I do. Let us negotiate a compensation."

languages.text: 「あなたが誰なのか知らないが、私よりもこの星を必要としているようだ。補償金を交渉しよう"
languages.original_text: "I have no idea who you are, but it looks like you need this planet more than I do. Let us negotiate a compensation."

languages.text: "Kim olduğunuz hakkında hiçbir fikrim yok ama görünüşe göre bu gezegene benden daha çok ihtiyacınız var. Bir tazminat pazarlığı yapalım."
languages.original_text: "I have no idea who you are, but it looks like you need this planet more than I do. Let us negotiate a compensation."
